_instructions: Copy this file, fill every field, save as brand-config.json in your working directory. This file is read by all agents before writing.

brand.name: Your Brand Name
brand.one_line: One sentence — what you do and who you help

voice.tone: e.g. calm, analytical, zero hype — writes like a founder texting a peer
voice.pov: e.g. pattern recognition — studies what works and filters out noise
voice.anti: e.g. no guru language, no hype, no sensationalism
voice.reader_position: e.g. reader is always the hero, not the brand

audience.who: e.g. early-stage SaaS founders, solo builders, indie hackers
pain: I don't know what to post
I want customers not vanity metrics

writing_rules.second_line: must recook the hook — add a twist or deepen the intrigue
writing_rules.paragraph_style: grouped — 2-3 related sentences together, never single lines stacked
writing_rules.closer: always a question or sharp one-liner
writing_rules.dash: regular dash - only, never em dash

platform_tone.linkedin: founder-to-founder, analytical, calm authority — peer sharing a pattern
platform_tone.x: punchy, reactive, own take in real time — thought mid-build not news summary
platform_tone.instagram: same as LinkedIn but slightly warmer, more visual language
platform_tone.facebook: personal, conversational, like a message to a smart friend — opens with observation, no bullet lists

image_prompt.background: light grid or off-white paper — no coffee stains, no cream always
image_prompt.headline: hand-lettered, bold, states the achievement or core insight
image_prompt.chart: one required — bar, pie, timeline, or flow — hand-drawn style
image_prompt.icons: hand-drawn for any tools, concepts, or steps mentioned
image_prompt.colours: multi-colour ink — navy, rust, teal, amber, yellow accents
image_prompt.feel: smart founder's notebook — not Canva, not corporate, not sketch
image_prompt.rule: image alone must tell the full story without reading the post
prompt_must_include: What the chart shows (type + actual data points)
Layout description (top / centre / bottom / left / right)

training_posts.note: Add 5-12 of your best performing posts here. Claude studies these for rhythm, hook style, and voice before writing. Do not add posts you want to copy — add posts that show your pattern.
training_posts.why_it_worked: Short note on what made this land

sources: List URLs or search strategies the researcher agent should use
